items.br: Extrai itens de competencia em documentos de avaliacao de performance com secoes. Suporta avaliacao de competencias em ciclos de performance review.
items.en: Extracts competency items in performance evaluation documents with sections. Supports competency assessment in performance review cycles.
items.es: Extrae ítems de competencia en documentos de evaluación de performance con secciones. Soporta evaluación de competencias en ciclos de performance review.
